name: boardforge-plugin
description: Codex plugin workflow for safe local KiCad automation through BoardForge-controlled tools.

interface.shortDescription: Safe local KiCad automation for Codex hardware workflows.
interface.longDescription: BoardForge Plugin lets Codex act as an AI hardware engineering agent by calling structured BoardForge tools instead of directly editing KiCad files or running arbitrary shell commands.
defaultPrompt: Create an outline-only KiCad board from this spec.
Scan this KiCad project and summarize missing footprints.
Package this KiCad project for JLCPCB review.
